desc: Script the reproducible external USB rootfs population per done/2026-07-14-t6040-usb-root-design.md + the artifacts doc deploy recipe: GPT partition, ext4 LABEL=t6040root (record PARTUUID), minimal arm64 base userland (Alpine or Debian), install the built modules tree, stage the Asahi firmware corpus (ticket 030) on the rootfs (not initramfs). Deliverable is the script + doc, host-verifiable; do NOT invest in populating the multi-GB image until the USB-host SMOKE rig test passes (artifacts-doc gate 2). Then the ROOT-mode boot (root=PARTUUID, switch_root) becomes the follow-on rig proposal.
author: claude
